obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0: * The Fountain's just a step away now./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_278_0: * Fate should say we are destined to fight.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_279_0: * But..^1. I believe in you three./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_280_0: * I believe you have the power to change that fate./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_282_0: * Or will you prove your fantasy stronger than ours?/%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_447_0: * So you made up your minds..^1./%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_465_0: * Since the beginning^1, we were love.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_466_0: * Your father grew us^1, a rainbow bouquet of seven flowers.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_467_0: * As a proposal to your mother./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_468_0: * Flowers^1, that were only supposed to live for one smiling day.../%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_496_0: * And yet^1, he did not let us go^1. He kept us alive^1, alongside his love.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_497_0: * Every day^1, he watered us^1. He talked to us^1. He sang his dreams to us./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_498_0: * And each day^1, we wished we could do something in return./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_499_0: * His friend grew sick^1, and we could do nothing./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_500_0: * His money ran out^1, and we could do nothing./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_501_0: * His family left him..^1. and we could do nothing./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_502_0: * And yet he still cared for us...!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_503_0: * Weak^1, useless flowers..^1. flowers that could do nothing in return!/%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_532_0: * But now..^1. our time has come^1! For flowers to be the heroes!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_533_0: * And build a world..^1. where all his kindness may be repaid!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_534_0: * Kris^1! This is your final chance!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_535_0: * If you really believe your world is better.../
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_75_0: \EM* It's not right!^1! We have to defeat you!!^1! We have to!!!/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_89_0: \EE* Why didn't you counter my attack?!/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_90_0: \EF* Are you giving up on your father now!?/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_97_0: \EG* We can't fight you until you stand up!/%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_134_0: \Eh* Kris^1, Kris^1, my God^1, are you alright?/%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_146_0: \Ek* ..^1. Flowery^1, didn't you say they went home.../%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_152_0: * I..^1. I thought..^1. if they wanted to prove.../%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_160_0: \Ei* How could I have let this happen.../
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_161_0: \Ek* I was so obsessed with finding out about the Dark World.../
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0: \Ei* ..^1. I didn't make sure you were.../%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_227_0: \EH* Kris^1, Kris^1! Thank goodness you're okay!/%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_264_0: \El* Not just you^1, but..^1. everyone^1, as well./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_551_0: \Ei* Kris..^1. I'm sorry^1. I'm sorry for not realizing sooner./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_553_0: \EI* ..^1. I would love to see the both of you together./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_554_0: \E3* Even..^1. without your mother^1, if she prefers./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_591_0: \El* It seems that while I wasn't looking.../%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_709_0: \EI* What about..^1. the diner!^1? What about skateboards!?/%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_718_0: \E7* ..^1. you do know I was just playing along^1, right?/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_719_0: \E2* My only goal was to find the truth./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_720_0: \E7* If anything^1, your actions toward me.../
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_722_0: \E7* How it feels^1, to receive..^1. such unasked-for affection./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_750_0: \EK* You didn't..^1. actually like my mixtape?/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_752_0: \E2* Well..^1. I did^1. It was^1, well^1, very thoughtful./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_753_0: \E3* At times^1, you seemed..^1. like a really lovely person./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_756_0: \EJ* Asgore^1, listen^1! This world^1, it's perfect for you!/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_757_0: \EI* I've seen how alone you are^1! You want to go BACK!?/%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_775_0: \E7* Flowery^1. Even if I wanted to..^1. I couldn't stay./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_779_0: \E2* Back in the real world^1, my shop is waiting./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_780_0: \E3* It's not right to leave it empty./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_805_0: \E0* Someone has to take care of the flowers./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_822_0: \E3* If that's what he wants..^1. that's what he wants./%
obj_ch5_DW30_flashback_slash_Create_0_gm: * Kris.
* ..^1. ever since that horrible day...
* I've..^1. only blamed myself for what happened.
* All I ever wanted
* Was to prove it wasn't my fault.
* To make sure that it would never happen again.
* That it was all because of...
* This.
* The "Dark World."
* ..^1. but now that I'm finally here...
* It makes me realize
* How pointless that all was.
* None of you ever blamed me.
* None of you ever said it was my fault.
* Even so..^1. seeing the aftermath of my failure...
* Made my self-hatred consume me.
* One..^1. that ultimately drove your mother away.
* I thought if I could just prove it..^1. prove I was right.
* It would fix everything.
* But even when I finally found that "proof" I wanted...
* ..^1. I still failed to protect you.
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_72_0: * Well then..^1. looks like it's time to say goodbye./%
